input: Decision log: Deploy v2.0 to production. Owner: DevOps team (Alex). Date: Friday 2pm. Condition: staging tests must pass. Verifier: Alex will check staging dashboard at 1pm. Contingency: if tests fail, deployment moves to next Tuesday.

evidence: Proper conditional decision. All four elements present plus explicit condition, verifier, and contingency.
